ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code (UPC) of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "extended_retail_price" REAL /* Extended retail price of the product (including tax and other fees) */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the condition is the default condition for new products */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_condition_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the condition changed */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the condition change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_condition_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_condition_history_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES product_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_condition_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the product */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was recorded */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., product, category, brand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order (quantity * unit price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, sales associate) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the employee works */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employee */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON-formatted list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
